tasks.notes: Implemented NUT-01/02: keyset generation (secp256k1, one keypair per denomination), NUT-02 keyset ID derivation (SHA-256 of sorted compressed pubkeys, version prefix 0x00), SQLAlchemy async ORM models, CRUD helpers, Pydantic API models, and three REST endpoints: GET /v1/keys (active keyset public keys), GET /v1/keys/{keyset_id} (specific keyset), GET /v1/keysets (list metadata). Private keys are never exposed via API. Keyset persists across restarts via DB. On startup, generates a keyset from MINT_PRIVATE_KEY env var or warns and uses random key.

acceptance_criteria_met: GET /v1/keys returns active keyset public keys in NUT-01 format
GET /v1/keysets returns list of keysets in NUT-02 format
GET /v1/keys/{keyset_id} returns keys for specific keyset
Keyset ID is deterministically derived from public keys per NUT-02
Private keys stored in database, never exposed via API
Keyset persists across server restarts (loaded from database)
context.integration_notes: Requires Worker 001 to complete task 001 (project bootstrap, pyproject.toml with coincurve/fastapi/sqlalchemy deps) and task 003 (DB setup with cashu_mint.db.base.Base and AsyncSessionLocal). These are expected dependencies.
